_comment: PL-084/HYG-3 interim drift-guard manifest. The OIDC relying-party core is copy-pasted between the two tenant frontends until the shared @kriegerdataforge/oidc-rp package is extracted (owner-deferred post-launch, 2026-06-25). Each pair below is a file that SHOULD be byte-identical (modulo line endings) in both repos; check_oidc_drift.py compares them weekly and keeps one dedup tracking issue (label ops:oidc-rp-drift) open while any pair differs. 'excluded' documents deliberately-uncompared files so nobody re-adds them: src/proxy.ts carries app-specific BFF allow-lists and env wiring, so full-file comparison is permanently noisy — its shared tryRefreshSession core gets factored out by the extraction epic instead.

excluded.reason: app-specific BFF allow-lists/env wiring make full-file comparison permanently noisy; the shared tryRefreshSession core is factored out by the PL-084 extraction epic
